faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Travis's location near the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge and abundant green spaces provides ideal habitat for stink bugs. These pests are attracted to the area's vegetation during warmer months and then seek entry into nearby homes and businesses as temperatures drop, making fall infestations particularly common in this westernmost Staten Island neighborhood.
